description: Inspired by the cheeky quotes on statement tees, this fastrack watch refuses to conform, with its sassy statement on the strap. Minimalist design, classic round face, and a rubber strap give it a modern feel backed up by a plastic case for optimal performance. Wear this with trendy, casual ensembles - colour-pop tees, denims and bright ballet flats. Case diameter: 39 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Round Plastic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Rubber strap with tang clasp for comfort and style Black dial with a text and design in white Text along the straps Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistant up to 30 meters allowing you to use it when washing hands or in mild rain
